chapter_title.ar: بَابُ الْإِشَارَةِ وَ النَّصِّ عَلَى أَبِي الْحَسَنِ الرِّضَا ( عليه السلام )
chapter_title.en: Chapter 72 – The Indication and the wordings upon Abu Al-Hassan Al-Reza<sup>asws</sup>

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/342)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/342)
text: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي إِبْرَاهِيمَ ( عليه السلام ) جُعِلْتُ فِدَاكَ إِنِّي قَدْ كَبِرَ سِنِّي فَخُذْ بِيَدِي مِنَ النَّارِ قَالَ فَأَشَارَ إِلَى ابْنِهِ أَبِي الْحَسَنِ ( عليه السلام ) فَقَالَ هَذَا صَاحِبُكُمْ مِنْ بَعْدِي .

en.hubeali: Ahmad Bin Mihran, from Muhammad Bin Ali, from Muhammad Bin Sinan and Ismail Bin Abbad Al Qasary, altogether from Dawood Al Raqqy who said,

‘I said to Abu Ibrahim<sup>asws</sup> (7<sup>th</sup> Imam<sup>asws</sup>, ‘May I be sacrificed for you<sup>asws</sup>! I have aged a lot, so take my hand out from the fire’. So he<sup>asws</sup> gestured towards his<sup>asws</sup> son<sup>asws</sup> Abu Al-Hassan<sup>asws</sup>, and he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘This one<sup>asws</sup> is your Master<sup>asws</sup> after me<sup>asws</sup>’.
en.sarwar: 3. Ahmad ibn Mihran has narrated from Muhammad ibn Ali from Muhammad ibn Sinan and Isma‘il ibn ‘Abbad al-Qasri, all from Dawud al-Raqqi who has said the following. “I said to abu Ibrahim (a.s.), ‘May Allah take my soul in service for your cause, I have become old, take my hand out of fire.” The narrator has said that the Imam (a.s.) pointed to his son, abu al-Hassan (a.s.) and then said, “This is your guardian after me.”
